basic_details.job_title: IIM Ranchi Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Professor, Associate Professor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Ranchi (IIM Ranchi)
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Professor Grade-II / Grade-I, Associate Professor, Professor
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Ranchi (IIM Ranchi) Faculty Recruitment Notification 2026 has been released on July 2026 on the official website www.iimranchi.ac.in. The total number of vacancies has not been specified through the IIM Ranchi Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Essential Qualification: Ph.D. or equivalent degree with a strong publication record in ABDC/ABS journals. | Designation-wise Experience:

salary_details.details: Additional Benefits: LTC, Medical Reimbursement, EPF/NPS, Faculty Development Allowance, Conference Support, Consultancy with income sharing, etc.

how_to_apply: Visit the official career page: https://www.iimranchi.ac.in/careers
Fill the online application form carefully (Advt. No. ADVT/IIMR/IPC-FR/ALL/2026/JUL).
Submit all required documents and details.
Persons in service should apply through proper channel and submit NOC at the time of seminar/interview.
important_instructions: Mere fulfillment of qualifications does not guarantee call for seminar/interview. The Institute reserves the right to shortlist candidates as per its criteria. Reservation policy as per Government of India rules. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. For technical queries, email: [email protected] (cc: [email protected]) or call 9547512477.

rows.indian_institute_of_management_ranchi_ii: Assistant Professor Grade-II / Grade-I, Associate Professor, Professor
Information Systems & Business Analytics, Finance & Accounting, Legal Studies & Responsible Business (Business Law)

content_sections.heading: Minimum Qualification & Experience
content_sections.text: Essential Qualification: Ph.D. or equivalent degree with a strong publication record in ABDC/ABS journals. Designation-wise Experience:

rows.experience_requirement: 6 years (at least 3 years at Assistant Professor level in peer institutions)
10 years (at least 4 years at Associate Professor level in IIMs/IITs/IISc etc.)

content_sections.heading: Pay Scale (7th CPC)
content_sections.text: Additional Benefits: LTC, Medical Reimbursement, EPF/NPS, Faculty Development Allowance, Conference Support, Consultancy with income sharing, etc.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIM Ranchi Faculty Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official career page: https://www.iimranchi.ac.in/careers Fill the online application form carefully (Advt. No. ADVT/IIMR/IPC-FR/ALL/2026/JUL). Submit all required documents and details. Persons in service should apply through proper channel and submit NOC at the time of seminar/interview.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Mere fulfillment of qualifications does not guarantee call for seminar/interview. The Institute reserves the right to shortlist candidates as per its criteria. Reservation policy as per Government of India rules. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. For technical queries, email: [email protected] (cc: [email protected] ) or call 9547512477.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIM Ranchi Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application is 29 July 2026 by 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. Which departments are hiring faculty at IIM Ranchi?
faq.answer: Information Systems & Business Analytics, Finance & Accounting, and Legal Studies & Responsible Business.

faq.question: Q3. What is the pay scale for Professor at IIM Ranchi?
faq.answer: Rs. 1,59,100 – 2,20,200 with entry pay of Rs. 1,59,100 under 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q4. Is PhD mandatory for Assistant Professor at IIM Ranchi?
faq.answer: Yes, Ph.D. or equivalent degree is essential for all faculty positions.

faq.question: Q5. What is the experience required for Associate Professor at IIM Ranchi?
faq.answer: Minimum 6 years of experience, with at least 3 years at Assistant Professor level in reputed institutions.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for IIM Ranchi Assistant Professor vacancy?
faq.answer: Submit the online application through https://www.iimranchi.ac.in/careers.

faq.question: Q7. Does IIM Ranchi provide additional benefits to faculty members?
faq.answer: Yes, including LTC, medical facilities, conference support, consultancy, and EPF/NPS contribution.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates with industry experience apply for IIM Ranchi Faculty positions?
faq.answer: Yes, relevant industry experience is considered along with research/teaching experience.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age limit for IIM Ranchi Professor Recruitment?
faq.answer: No specific upper age limit mentioned; selection is based on academic credentials and experience.

faq.question: Q10. Will shortlisted candidates be called for seminar at IIM Ranchi?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be invited for seminar/interview as per institute norms.
